title: Create: Aerodynamics
description: Unleash the power in your world
body: **Create: Aerodynamics** is a carefully curated modpack built around the core concept of engineering, automation, and flight. Centered on **Create Aeronautics**, this pack expands the traditional Create experience into the skies, allowing players to design, build, and operate complex flying machines. ## Overview This modpack enhances the mechanical depth of the Create ecosystem while introducing aviation-focused gameplay. From early-game contraptions to advanced airborne systems, progression is designed to feel natural and rewarding. ## Core Features - **Aviation Systems** Build functional airships and flying contraptions using Create Aeronautics. - **Expanded Create Ecosystem** Includes a wide range of Create addons that introduce new mechanics, blocks, and automation possibilities. - **Logistics & Automation** Advanced item transport, processing chains, and factory design options. - **Performance Optimizations** Integrated performance mods ensure smooth gameplay even with complex machines. - **Quality of Life Improvements** UI enhancements, better inventory management, and helpful tools for building and exploration. ## Included Content - Extensive **Create addon support** (decoration, logistics, industry, and more) - Farming, food, and survival improvements - Exploration and immersion features - Visual and rendering enhancements ## Goal of the Modpack The primary focus of **Create: Aerodynamics** is to provide a cohesive and immersive engineering experience, with a strong emphasis on **innovation, creativity, and aerial mechanics**. Players are encouraged to: - Design efficient factories - Experiment with mechanical systems - Push the limits of airborne engineering ## Compatibility - Designed for stability and long-term playthroughs - Optimized mod selection to reduce conflicts - Suitable for both singleplayer and multiplayer environments ## Notes This modpack is actively refined to maintain balance between performance, complexity, and gameplay depth.
